title: Retail Store Manager (HOUZE+ / HOUZE / Table Matters)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a dynamic and results-driven Retail Store Manager to lead our retail operations for HOUZE+, HOUZE, and Table Matters stores. As part of the Matters Brand Ecosystem, you’ll play a key role in bringing our vision — “where everything in your home matters” — to life through exceptional in-store experiences.

This role requires strong leadership, operational excellence, and a passion for design, lifestyle, and customer engagement. You will manage daily store operations, team performance, sales targets, visual merchandising, and customer satisfaction.


Key Responsibilities

🔹 Store Operations & Performance

  • Oversee daily operations to ensure smooth store functioning and compliance with company SOPs.
  • Drive sales performance to meet and exceed monthly revenue targets.
  • Monitor inventory levels, stock transfers, and product displays to ensure optimal availability and visual appeal.
  • Implement and uphold operational excellence across POS systems, cash handling, and store maintenance.

🔹 Team Leadership & Development

  • Lead, motivate, and coach retail associates to achieve sales and service excellence.
  • Manage scheduling, training, and performance reviews.
  • Foster a positive, team-oriented environment aligned with the “Matters” brand values.

🔹 Customer Experience

  • Deliver a best-in-class customer experience that reflects the brand’s design-led, lifestyle ethos.
  • Resolve customer feedback and escalations professionally and promptly.
  • Cultivate long-term customer relationships through personalized service and product knowledge.

🔹 Visual Merchandising & Brand Presentation

  • Ensure that store displays and merchandising adhere to brand standards.
  • Collaborate with HQ marketing and VM teams to execute campaigns and product launches.
  • Maintain store aesthetics that reflect the brand’s design and functional philosophy.

🔹 Reporting & Analysis

  • Analyze sales data and KPIs to identify trends and opportunities for improvement.
  • Prepare regular reports on sales, footfall, and team performance.
  • Recommend strategies to optimize store operations and profitability.

Requirements

  • Minimum 3–5 years of retail management experience (homeware, lifestyle, or fashion preferred).
  • Proven track record in achieving sales targets and managing retail teams.
  • Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
  • Passionate about home décor, design, and creating memorable customer experiences.
  • Proficiency in retail POS systems and basic inventory management software.
  • Able to work weekends, public holidays, and retail shifts as required.

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary package with performance-based incentives.
  • Opportunities to grow within a fast-evolving lifestyle brand ecosystem.
  • Staff discounts across all “Matters” brands (Table Matters, HOUZE, Aroma Matters, and more).
  • Dynamic, creative work environment where design, functionality, and customer experience truly matter.

About the Brands

HOUZE+ / HOUZE — Modern home organization and storage solutions designed to simplify and elevate everyday living.
Table Matters — Artistic tableware and lifestyle brand redefining the dining experience through art, form, and function.
Together, we form part of the “Matters” ecosystem — where everything in your home matters.

postedCompany.description:
Sheldon Global (HOUZE)

Our story begins in 2017 with only one goal on our mind - relooking at the quality of life. You must be thinking, “Nah, it's impossible here in our sunny little island la.” But we knew otherwise. It is easy, really. We started with a lean team of 5 just by looking at the space you live in. Over the years we grew into a family of 30 by providing affordable and quality storage solutions easily achievable even with space restraints.


Our team is passionate about what we’re doing and takes pride in what we deliver to the community. Here at HOUZE, we like having fun. Like our founder always says, “Eh, we play hard and work smart.”. Well of course, it's not all magical like a fairy tale when it comes to workplace reality but we make sure we adhere to the quality-of-life mantra while we work. We know when to focus and when to have fun. If you like how this sounds so far, we welcome you.


Secretly tell you ah, in this company we are all very well fed. We get to eat lots of delicious food and bites brought in by our beloved founders. Don’t be surprised if you are served booze instead of coffee over meetings. Annually, we get to visit new places together. So why join us you asked?


We’re a growing tech company which focuses on e-commerce and automation to make everyone's life at work easier. If you're a dynamic individual looking for your next adventure, or just starting your career and looking for a company that creates progressive career-building opportunities don’t hesitate to join us. We offer ample opportunities, training and development programs that empower you to expand your skills and abilities.
postedCompany.name: SHELDON GLOBAL PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
